title: Guard declared operation against actual change
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 6：阻止以 document 声明掩盖运行时代码改动，校验 declared operation 与实际 Diff 的领域、环境、权限和副作用一致性；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Fail closed when declared operation metadata conflicts with changed file behavior.

outOfScope: Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Actual Diff classification and declared effect consistency guard.
Structured operation evidence consumed by trust signals.
Declared document versus runtime Diff regression coverage.
Operation and domain fail-closed regression coverage.
Documents declared versus actual consistency boundaries.

riskAssessment.reason: The guard compares deterministic path and operation evidence without changing runtime behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded governance Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Verify document/test/sandbox paths remain allowed while runtime or production mismatches fail closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Declared document effect conflicts with runtime code Diff and reports concrete changed-path evidence.
Legitimate documentation, tests, and sandbox mock changes remain allowed.
Guard output is out_of_scope with the concrete changed path when a document effect conflicts with runtime code, and tests plus documentation cover the result.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: A Work Item can declare a safe document effect while changing runtime code, allowing path relabeling to bypass operation policy.
constraints: Preserve legitimate documentation, test, and sandbox mock changes.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: Actual Diff evidence must be compared with declared operation metadata at the ownership gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: document effect with runtime code Diff

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this guard, tests, and documentation Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
